channel.title: BSARC Weekly Bulletin Archive on Brunswick Shores Amateur Radio Club
channel.description: Recent content in BSARC Weekly Bulletin Archive on Brunswick Shores Amateur Radio Club

item.title: Weekly Bulletin: Local Net Activations & Field Day Logistics
item.description:
📡 Emergency Operations Net Updates

The weekly local VHF traffic net completed check-ins across southeastern NC with 24 operators logged. Signal loops confirmed robust simplex links along the coast.

⛺ ARRL Field Day Plan Matrix

Preparations are finalizing for our operation station footprint at Calabash Town Park next month. The logging software configurations are locked down on the club master server rigs.

📄 Document Distribution Link

For the complete graphic layout spreadsheet, review the verified PDF file upload here: 👉 Download Complete Secretary Bulletin Attachment Pack (PDF)

item.title: Weekly Bulletin: New HF SSB Net, ARES Rotations & Welcome Julia KR4LQQ
item.description:
📡 Weekly Local Radio Net Alignments

Our persistent radio networks remain fully configured for your local check-ins:

  • 🎙️ The Shrimp Net: Every Monday morning at 8:30 AM via the 147.315 MHz machine (+600 offset, Tone 118.8 Hz).
  • 🛡️ Brunswick County ARES Net: Every Monday evening at 7:00 PM using the same 147.315 MHz repeater (+600 offset, Tone 118.8 Hz).
  • 🏠 AUXCOM / ARES Operations Meeting: Bi-monthly at 5:00 PM at the BEMC Headquarters Building in Supply, NC. This meeting proceeds directly ahead of the business meeting on months when our main club gather shifts to the Supply facility.

📝 ARES Net Control Station (NCS) Schedule

Activation Date Station Call Sign Last Name First Name
May 25, 2026 KY4HL Donua Erin
June 1, 2026 KR4DHF Wills Matt
June 8, 2026 KI4KK Fryer George
June 15, 2026 N4PEN Sirginson Bill

📻 New Experimental Monthly HF SSB Net

You are cordially invited to join an experimental high-frequency operational pipeline coordinated by Gary Quinn (NC4S) designed to gauge community traffic interest and sharpen local propagation tracking.

item.title: Weekly Bulletin: Hurricane Expo Thanks, May Meeting at BEMC & Dayton Hamvention
item.description:
🌪️ Ready Brunswick Preparedness Expo Success

A huge shout-out and thank you to everyone who stepped up to support the club event at the Ready Brunswick Preparedness Expo on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. Your outstanding dedication and public interaction help ensure our communities remain informed and our operators stand ready if and when disaster strikes. Well done, team!

🏛️ BSARC Monthly Club Meeting Tonight

Don’t forget that this month’s official business meeting takes place tonight!
